author: ryandawsonuk
text: Some of our docs [recommend an old ambassador version](https://github.com/SeldonIO/seldon-core/search?q=%22at+present+we+recommend%22&unscoped_q=%22at+present+we+recommend%22). The [issue referred to is still present](https://github.com/SeldonIO/seldon-core/issues/473) but that version is a long way behind now. We could at least change the text to "Note that instability has been observed in rolling updates for grpc with ambassador since ambassador version 0.40.2". Or just take that text out.
